description: Golden RAG dataset. Each case is a factual question answerable from ONE verified official source in data/source-manifest.json (v2 — all HTTP 200). The M1 eval:rag suite asserts: answer cites expected_citation_url, answer is <= max_sentences, answer mentions answer_must_contain terms, and LLM-judged faithfulness/relevance >= 0.8. Citation URLs are drawn verbatim from the verified manifest.

cases.question: What benchmark index does the HDFC Flexi Cap Fund use?
Which equity category does the HDFC Mid-Cap Opportunities Fund belong to?
Is the HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund an equity, debt, or hybrid fund?
What type of mutual fund is the HDFC Liquid Fund?
What benchmark index does the HDFC Mid-Cap Opportunities Fund track?
